title: Venezuelan Empanada Chips with Chocolate Malty Dip
description: A sweet and crispy dessert inspired by Venezuelan street food. Crunchy empanada chips served with a rich malty chocolate dip.
instructions: 2. Cut the empanadas into thin strips and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the malted milk powder, chocolate chips, and peanut brittle.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the vanilla extract and melted chocolate.
5. Add the chocolate mixture to the powder mixture and stir until combined.
6. Serve the empanada chips with the malty chocolate dip.
7. Enjoy as a sweet and crunchy dessert!
